productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Printed  White and Red Kurta
description: Composition Printed red kurta made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a V-neck, short sleeves, sequin and thread detailing along the borders of the collar, red chest placket and sleeve hems, mock buttons on the placket, and red tape detailing above the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The red placket and sequin detailing add zing to this garment. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
